title: • Metaphor: “Two Keys to Unlock the Final Grade”
content:
• Metaphor: “Two Keys to Unlock the Final Grade”
• Students must submit two thorough, structured feedback letters (not just “looks good” responses).
• If they do not, they are locked out from final submissions and must complete an additional research-based task (TBD).
• Peer review must be treated as crucial, not optional.

✅ Why This Works:
• Ensures collaborative engagement & accountability.
• Prevents students from “ghosting” the final stages.
• Teaches critical editing & constructive feedback skills.

📚 2. Research-Based Writing for All Paths
• Every student must complete a research-based writing assignment during the semester.
• All students must complete an annotated bibliography in some format.
• Research assignments appear across all paths but in different forms:
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 79 (chunk 79/108)
